description_for_human: KYC gate extension for x402 endpoints. Verify once with your wallet, transact anywhere.
description_for_model: KYC gate extension for x402 payment protocol using Sign-In-With-X (SIWX). If you are a SERVER AGENT (seller): use createKYCGateHook and declareKYCGateExtension from the bouncer library to require KYC on your x402 endpoints. If you are a CLIENT AGENT (buyer): when you see a kyc-gate extension in a 402 response, sign the SIWX challenge and POST to /api/onboard with your SIWX message + signature to start KYC. Check /api/verify/{address} to see if your wallet is already verified.
